caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recording in a studio with dark, ribbed acoustic foam walls. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt, with tattoos visible on his right arm. He is positioned in front of a professional silver microphone mounted on a boom arm, which features the text "Rode" on the shock mount. As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand. In the beginning, he looks slightly to the side with a focused expression, his mouth partially open. As time moves forward, he continues to talk, shifting his gaze and slightly changing his facial expression, while his hand moves in a fluid motion across his chest. The setting and equipment remain static while the man's subtle movements and expressions convey an active conversation.
